printer_verbatim: The 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore.
title: The Punjab Record, Part I, Volume XLIV, No. 11
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 24, dated the 14th January, 1910.
notes: Punjab Record judicial reports, Nov 1909 (a later volume XLIV, registering with a shorter lag than the 1908 issues). Periodical. Composite pagination.

title: The Punjab Record, Part I, Volume XLIV, No. 12
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 25, dated the 14th January, 1910.
notes: Punjab Record, Dec 1909. Periodical. Composite pagination.

title: The Punjab Record, Part I, Volume XLV, No. 1
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 10, dated the 28th January, 1910.
notes: Punjab Record, Jan 1910 (Vol XLV opens) — a current-quarter issue with near-immediate registration. Periodical. Composite pagination.

title: The Punjab Record, Part I, Volume XLV, No. 2
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 35, dated the 21st March, 1910.
notes: Punjab Record, Feb 1910. Printed reg 306 also appears at p38 s8 (Gauhar-i-Sukhan); possible collision/misread, flagged. Periodical. Composite pagination.

flags.issue: printed reg 306 also recorded at p38 s8 (Gauhar-i-Sukhan); possible misread/collision

title: The Punjab Record, Part II, Executive, Volume XLIII, No. 2
gloss: Part II, Executive Volume, XLIII, No. 2, for the quarter ending June 1908.
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 43, dated the 14th March, 1910.
notes: Punjab Record Part II (Executive rulings, as distinct from Part I Judicial), a mid-1908 issue registering March 1910 — the executive/administrative counterpart series. Periodical. Composite pagination.

title: The Punjab Record, Part II, Executive, Volume XLIV, No. 13
gloss: Volume XLIV, No. 13, for the quarter ending September 1909.
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 9, dated the 28th January, 1910.
notes: Punjab Record Part II Executive, Sept-1909 quarter — closes the eight-issue Punjab Record run (s1-8) that dominates the LAW periodicals; the colonial legal-reporting apparatus is the single largest periodical presence. Periodical. Long composite pagination preserved.

title: The Review of Religions, Volume VIII, No. 11
gloss: For November, 1909. Edited by M. Muhammad Ali, M.A.
publisher: The Manager, Review of Religions, Qadian, Gurdaspur district
notes: The Review of Religions — the flagship ENGLISH-language journal of the AHMADIYYA movement, edited by Maulana Muhammad Ali, M.A., published from QADIAN itself; the Ahmadi apologetic reaching an anglophone/global audience. Directly links to the anti-'Mirzai' polemic at p40 s4: here is the very Qadiani organ those tracts opposed. A key node in the Ahmadiyya controversy that defined Punjab's religious field. Periodical. Bracket note: previous issue at entry No. 14, page 46 of the Catalogue for the quarter ending 31st December 1909.
